# O16 + p > N13 + a   [O16_p__N13_a]   ref=CF88  (analytic, PRIMAT-main.m)
# forward[T9] = With[{T953=T9^(5/3),T932=T9^(3/2)}, With[{T9A=T9/(1.+7.76*^-2*T9+2.64*^-2*T953/(1.+7.76*^-2*T9)^(2./3.))}, With[{T9A13=T9A^(1./3.),T9A56=T9A^(5./6.)}, With[{SVRev=1.88*^18*T9A56/T932*Exp[-35.829/T9A13]*1.7232*^-1}, With[{SVDir=SVRev/0.172255*Exp[-60.5573/T9]}, SVDir]]]]]   uncertainty factor f = 3
